name: Due for 1st Viral Load
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(baseline_regimen_start_date, INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_audit_tool_art_patients mfatap on p.patient_id = mfatap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_patients_latest_viral_load mfplvl ON mfatap.client_id = mfplvl.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto ON mfatap.client_id = mfto.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_patients_latest_viral_load_ordered mfplvlo ON mfatap.client_id = mfplvlo.client_id WHERE (CURRENT_DATE() BETWEEN DATE_ADD(baseline_regimen_start_date, INTERVAL 5 MONTH) AND DATE_ADD(baseline_regimen_start_date, INTERVAL 6 MONTH)) AND dead=false AND mfplvl.client_id is NULL AND mfto.client_id is NULL AND mfplvlo.client_id is NULL
description: Patients who are due for their first viral load after enrollment into HIV Care

name: Overdue for First Viral Load
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(baseline_regimen_start_date, INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_audit_tool_art_patients mfatap on p.patient_id = mfatap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_patients_latest_viral_load mfplvl ON mfatap.client_id = mfplvl.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto ON mfatap.client_id = mfto.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_patients_latest_viral_load_ordered mfplvlo ON mfatap.client_id = mfplvlo.client_id WHERE CURRENT_DATE() >= DATE_ADD(baseline_regimen_start_date, INTERVAL 6 MONTH) AND dead=false AND mfplvl.client_id is NULL AND mfto.client_id is NULL AND mfplvlo.client_id is NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR ,baseline_regimen_start_date,CURDATE())< 1
description: Patients who are overdue for their first viral load after enrollment into HIV Care

name: Bled for Viral load
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id,DATE_FORMAT(order_date,'%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_patients_latest_viral_load_ordered mfplvlo on p.patient_id=mfplvlo.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfplvlo.client_id = mfap.client_id WHERE dead= FALSE and TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH,order_date,CURDATE()) <=1
message: Patient was bled for viral load on ${1} awaiting results
description: Patients who have been bled for viral load and awaiting results

name: Due for Routine Viral Load
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birthdate, CURDATE()) < 16, DATE_ADD(mfplvl.hiv_viral_collection_date, INTERVAL 6 MONTH), DATE_ADD(mfplvl.hiv_viral_collection_date, INTERVAL 12 MONTH)), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_patients_latest_viral_load mfplvl on p.patient_id = mfplvl.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfplvl.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto ON mfplvl.client_id = mfto.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_in mfti ON mfti.client_id = mfto.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_patients_latest_viral_load_ordered mfplvlo ON mfplvl.client_id = mfplvlo.client_id WHERE mfap.dead = FALSE AND (mfti.client_id IS NULL OR mfti.transfer_in_date > mfto.transfer_out_date) AND (mfplvlo.client_id IS NULL OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH,order_date,CURDATE()) >=2) AND DATEDIFF(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birthdate, CURDATE()) < 16, DATE_ADD(hiv_viral_collection_date, INTERVAL 6 MONTH), DATE_ADD(hiv_viral_collection_date, INTERVAL 12 MONTH)),CURDATE()) BETWEEN 0 AND 30
message: Due for Routine Viral Load on ${1}
description: Patients who are due for their routine viral load

name: Overdue for Routine Viral Load
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birthdate, CURDATE()) < 16, DATE_ADD(mfplvl.hiv_viral_collection_date, INTERVAL 6 MONTH), DATE_ADD(mfplvl.hiv_viral_collection_date, INTERVAL 12 MONTH)), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_patients_latest_viral_load mfplvl on p.patient_id =mfplvl.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfplvl.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto ON mfplvl.client_id = mfto.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_in mfti ON mfti.client_id = mfto.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_patients_latest_viral_load_ordered mfplvlo ON mfplvl.client_id = mfplvlo.client_id WHERE mfap.dead = FALSE AND mfplvl.hiv_viral_collection_date IS NOT NULL AND (mfti.client_id IS NULL OR mfti.transfer_in_date > mfto.transfer_out_date) AND (mfplvlo.client_id IS NULL OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH,order_date,CURDATE()) >=2) AND CURRENT_DATE() >IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birthdate, CURDATE()) < 16, DATE_ADD(hiv_viral_collection_date, INTERVAL 6 MONTH), DATE_ADD(hiv_viral_collection_date, INTERVAL 12 MONTH))
message: Overdue for Routine Viral Load from ${1}
description: Patients who are overdue for their routine viral load

name: Upcoming appointment
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(latest_return_date, '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_active_in_care mfac on p.patient_id = mfac.client_id WHERE dead = FALSE AND transfer_out_date IS NULL AND latest_return_date >= CURRENT_DATE()
description: Patients who have an upcoming appointment

name: Missed appointment
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(latest_return_date, '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_active_in_care mfac on p.patient_id = mfac.client_id WHERE dead = FALSE AND days_left_to_be_lost BETWEEN 7 AND 27 AND transfer_out_date IS NULL
description: Patients who have missed appointment - this is between 7 to 29 days

name: Lost
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(latest_return_date, INTERVAL 28 DAY), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_active_in_care mfac on mfac.client_id = p.patient_id WHERE dead = FALSE AND days_left_to_be_lost  BETWEEN 28 AND 89 AND transfer_out_date IS NULL
description: Patients who have missed appointment - this is between 30 to 89 days

name: Lost to Followup
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(latest_return_date, INTERVAL 90 DAY), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_active_in_care mfac on p.patient_id = mfac.client_id WHERE dead = FALSE AND days_left_to_be_lost >= 90 AND transfer_out_date IS NULL
description: Patients who have spent more than 90 days since their expected return date

name: Due for 1st DNA PCR
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(eid_dob, INTERVAL 6 WEEK), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_eid_patients mfep on p.patient_id = mfep.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_dim_person mdp ON mfep.client_id = mdp.person_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfep.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto on mfto.client_id = mfep.client_id WHERE mdp.dead = FALSE AND (TIMESTAMPDIFF(WEEK, eid_dob, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 6 AND 9) AND mfap.client_id is NULL AND `1ST_PCR_DATE` is NULL AND mfto.client_id is NULL
description: Exposed infants who are due for their first DNA PCR, between 6 to 9 weeks

name: Overdue for 1st DNA PCR
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(eid_dob, INTERVAL 6 WEEK), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_eid_patients mfep on p.patient_id = mfep.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_dim_person mdp ON mfep.client_id = mdp.person_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfep.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto on mfto.client_id = mfep.client_id WHERE mdp.dead = FALSE AND (TIMESTAMPDIFF(WEEK, eid_dob, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 10 AND 24) AND mfap.client_id is NULL AND `1ST_PCR_DATE` is NULL AND mfto.client_id is NULL
description: Exposed infants who are overdue for their first DNA PCR who are aged between 10 to 24 weeks

name: Due for 2nd DNA PCR
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(eid_dob, INTERVAL 9 WEEK), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_eid_patients mfep on p.patient_id = mfep.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_dim_person mdp ON mfep.client_id = mdp.person_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfep.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto on mfto.client_id = mfep.client_id WHERE mdp.dead = FALSE AND (TIMESTAMPDIFF(WEEK, eid_dob, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 9 AND 10) AND mfap.client_id is NULL AND `2ND_PCR_DATE` is NULL AND mfto.client_id is NULL
description: Exposed infants who are due for their second DNA PCR aged between 13 and 14 months

name: Overdue for 2nd DNA PCR
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(eid_dob, INTERVAL 9 WEEK), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_eid_patients mfep on p.patient_id = mfep.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_dim_person mdp ON mfep.client_id = mdp.person_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfep.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto on mfto.client_id = mfep.client_id WHERE mdp.dead = FALSE AND (TIMESTAMPDIFF(WEEK, eid_dob, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 11 AND 13) AND mfap.client_id is NULL AND `2ND_PCR_DATE` is NULL AND mfto.client_id is NULL
description: Exposed infants who are overdue for their second DNA PCR who are between 15 and 17 months since Rapid Test is due at 18 months

name: Due for 3rd DNA PCR
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(eid_dob, INTERVAL 13 MONTH), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_eid_patients mfep on p.patient_id = mfep.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_dim_person mdp ON mfep.client_id = mdp.person_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfep.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto on mfto.client_id = mfep.client_id WHERE mdp.dead = FALSE AND (TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, eid_dob, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 13 AND 14) AND mfap.client_id is NULL AND repeat_pcr_date is NULL AND mfto.client_id is NULL
description: Exposed infants who are due for their third DNA PCR aged between 13 and 14 months

name: OverDue for 3rd DNA PCR
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(eid_dob, INTERVAL 13 MONTH), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_eid_patients mfep on p.patient_id =mfep.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_dim_person mdp ON mfep.client_id = mdp.person_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfep.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto on mfto.client_id = mfep.client_id WHERE mdp.dead = FALSE AND (TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, eid_dob, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 15 AND 17) AND mfap.client_id is NULL AND repeat_pcr_date is NULL AND mfto.client_id is NULL
description: Exposed infants who are overdue for their third DNA PCR, 6 weeks after breastfeeding and having taken a 2nd DNA PCR

name: Due for Rapid Test
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(eid_dob, INTERVAL 18 MONTH), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_eid_patients mfep on p.patient_id = mfep.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_dim_person mdp ON mfep.client_id = mdp.person_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfep.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto on mfto.client_id = mfep.client_id WHERE mdp.dead = FALSE AND (TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, eid_dob, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 19) AND mfap.client_id is NULL AND rapid_pcr_date is NULL AND mfto.client_id is NULL
description: Exposed infants who are due for an 18 month rapid test

name: Overdue for Rapid Test
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(eid_dob, INTERVAL 18 MONTH), '%d.%b.%Y') FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_eid_patients mfep on p.patient_id = mfep.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_dim_person mdp ON mfep.client_id = mdp.person_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfep.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto on mfto.client_id = mfep.client_id WHERE mdp.dead = FALSE AND (TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, eid_dob, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 20 AND 24) AND mfap.client_id is NULL AND rapid_pcr_date is NULL AND mfto.client_id is NULL
description: Exposed infants who are overdue for an 18 month rapid test but not older than 24 months by which a final outcome is expected

name: Un-supressed Viral Load
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, hiv_viral_load_copies, DATE_FORMAT(mfplvl.encounter_date, '%d. %b. %Y'), specimen_type FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_patients_latest_viral_load mfplvl on p.patient_id = mfplvl.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfplvl.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto ON mfto.client_id = mfplvl.client_id WHERE (hiv_viral_load_copies>=1000) OR (specimen_type='WHOLE BLOOD' and hiv_viral_load_copies >200) OR (specimen_type='Dried Blood Spot' and hiv_viral_load_copies >400) AND dead = FALSE AND mfto.client_id IS NULL
message: Detectable Viral Load of ${1} from ${2} may be due for IAC
description: Patients who are have un-supressed viral load

name: Transfered Out Patient
criteria: SELECT p.patient_id, transfer_out_date FROM patient p inner join mamba_fact_transfer_out mfto on p.patient_id =mfto.client_id INNER JOIN mamba_fact_art_patients mfap ON mfap.client_id = mfap.client_id LEFT JOIN mamba_fact_transfer_in mfti on mfti.client_id = mfto.client_id where dead=false and (mfti.client_id is NULL or mfti.transfer_in_date > mfto.transfer_out_date)
description: Patients who are transfered Out to Another Facility

name: Monkey POX Patient
criteria: SELECT DISTINCT p.patient_id, obs.value_coded, CASE WHEN obs.value_coded = 166313 THEN 'Transferred to Isolation Unit' WHEN obs.value_coded = 168758 THEN 'Referred to Isolation Unit' ELSE cn.name END AS value_coded_text, DATE_FORMAT(obs.date_created,'%d. %b. %Y') AS formatted_date FROM obs INNER JOIN patient p ON p.patient_id = obs.person_id INNER JOIN concept_name cn ON obs.value_coded = cn.concept_id WHERE obs.concept_id = 198959
description: Monkey POX Patient
